brand.name: FOP
brand.tagline: The Operating Platform for Building Protection
brand.architecture: F Mark, FOP Wordmark, Living F

primaryNavy.usage: Primary typography and default F Mark colour

build.name: Electric Royal Blue
build.usage: BUILD lifecycle signal and Living F middle arm

advise.name: Platinum Silver
advise.usage: ADVISE lifecycle signal and Living F top arm

protect.name: Pastel Highlighter Green
protect.usage: PROTECT lifecycle signal and Living F vertical stem

halo.name: Coral Halo
halo.usage: Living F certification halo only after backend Protected-State approval

fMark.rules: Flat, one-colour, no glow, no halo, no text, no embedded lifecycle labels

fopWordmark.structure: F Mark plus FUZION, OPERATING PLATFORM™, BUILD • ADVISE • PROTECT, Buildings Under Protection™

livingF.rules: Never use as the permanent application logo. Coral halo appears only after backend Protected-State approval.
